model_b.name: deepseek-ai/deepseek-v4-flash
model_b.essence:

comparison.model_a_key_points: Focus on momentum and volatility as general concepts, emphasizes statistical significance across measures
comparison.model_b_key_points: Specific interpretation: volatility compression→reversal, low-vol momentum→continuation, extreme returns→mean reversion
comparison.difference_insight: GLM gives broad momentum/volatility framing; DeepSeek draws sharper directional predictions (reversal vs continuation) with clear separation of short/medium/long timeframes
comparison.seed_one_sentence: This batch reveals the market's multi-timeframe structure: short-term volatility expansion predicts reversal, medium-term controlled momentum predicts continuation, and long-term extreme returns predict mean reversion — all captured at different horizons by different signals
